productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid White Top
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, full sleeves and a brand name on the front Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Perfect in style and great in comfort, this white cotton t-shirt from united colors of benetton makes for great casual wear. The print on the front lends this tee a strong brand identity, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with slim fit jeans and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
